svg.title: MiniNet lockless multi-core architecture
svg.desc: Three CPU cores each pinned to an AP worker. Generator pushes via MPSC queues. AP workers drain SPSC relay rings into the relay thread. Relay does RCU lookup and pushes into per-client SPSC RX rings. AlignedCounter stats are padded per core.

g.text: relay is sole producer · client is sole consumer
